Feb 20 · Friday · Day 2

West Tokyo: shrines, style & neon

~50°F / 10°C, clearYamanote line day1 reservation
1
Morning8:00 - 11:00 AM

Quiet & sacred - Meiji Shrine

Start at Meiji Shrine right when it opens. The trip-report favorite trick: at 8am the forest path is nearly empty, you'll catch priests sweeping, and it quietly strips away the jet lag. A 10-minute walk drops you straight into Harajuku.

Free entryOpens ~6:40amMeiji-jingumae Stn
Open in Maps
🚂10-min walk: head south out of the shrine, follow Omotesando to Harajuku
2
Late morning11:00 AM - 1:00 PM

Harajuku shopping + lunch

Takeshita Street for chaotic kawaii energy and a rainbow crepe, then slip over to Cat Street / Ura-Harajuku - the calmer backstreet where the good Japanese streetwear and indie labels live. Your clothes-shopping window.

This is where you'll have lunch
🍲 Eat nearbyAfuri Harajuku - yuzu ramenMaisen - tonkatsuGyoza Lou - cheap eats
Clothes shoppingLunch around OmotesandoHarajuku Stn
Open in Maps
🚂JR Yamanote Line: Harajuku → Shibuya, 1 stop / 2 min (or 15-min walk via Cat St)
3
Early afternoon1:30 - 4:00 PM

Shibuya + your gaming hit

Walk south into Shibuya: do the Scramble Crossing (optional Shibuya Sky rooftop). Then the centerpiece - Shibuya Parco 6F: Nintendo Tokyo, Pokemon Center, Jump Shop & Capcom Store all on one floor. Budget a solid 1.5 hrs; this is a highlight.

🍲 Eat nearbyIchiran - tonkotsu ramenStreamer Coffee - latte break
Parco 6F gaming floorShibuya Sky optionalShibuya Stn
Open in Maps
🚂JR Yamanote Line: Shibuya → Takadanobaba, 6 stops / 13 min, then 10-min walk
4
Late afternoon4:30 - 5:10 PM

Capybaras at CapinessReservation required

Hop the Yamanote 5 min north to Takadanobaba for your Capiness reservation. A calm 40 minutes petting and hand-feeding capybaras - a mellow palate-cleanser before the night gets loud.

¥4,000 / person (~$27)40 min, book aheadTakadanobaba Stn
Open in Maps
🚂Rest at hotel, then JR Yamanote: Takadanobaba → Shinjuku, 2 stops / 5 min
⛰
Relax & change at the hotel5:15 - 6:00 PM · drop bags, recharge, regroup for dinner
5
Evening6:00 PM - late

Shinjuku neon & food

Down to Shinjuku. Dinner in Omoide Yokocho ("Memory Lane") - tiny smoky yakitori stalls, exactly the atmospheric food you want. Optional nightcaps in Golden Gai, free night view from the Tokyo Metropolitan Gov't Building, conbini run on the walk home.

🍲 Eat nearbyOmoide Yokocho yakitori stallsGolden Gai bars
Yakitori dinnerFree gov't bldg viewShinjuku Stn
